[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 01000110 3
1 01100000 2
2 01100000 2
3 00000000 a
4 01000100 2
5 00000010 1
6 01000110 3
7 00000010 1

01 10 01000000 1
12 21 00100000 1
23 32 10010010 3
34 43 00000010 1 match 5 7
45 54 00000011 2
56 65 01000110 3 match 0 6
67 76 01100000 2 match 1 2
70 07 01000000 1

02 20 00000000 a match 3
13 31 01000100 2 match 4
24 42 00000010 1 match 5 7
35 53 01000110 3 match 0 6
46 64 00000010 1 match 5 7
57 75 01001000 2
60 06 01000000 1
71 17 01100000 2 match 1 2

03 30 01000000 1
14 41 00000000 a match 3
25 52 00000010 1 match 5 7
36 63 01010110 4
47 74 00000000 a match 3
50 05 01000000 1
61 16 01100100 3
72 27 00100000 1

04 40 00000000 a match 3
15 51 01000100 2 match 4
26 62 00110010 3
37 73 01000000 1
